creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
I am still testing this solution on a bunch of workstations running 15-CURRENT or 14-STABLE. So far so good - no more stale addresses hanging for weeks on the interfaces.

Perhaps it's worth implementing now, to have it working in 15.0-RELEASE ? Will any brave committer show up to take the gauntlet?
